content: Presented a preview of six DNSOP drafts at **IETF 125 MAPRG**. [[Drafts](https://www.yuqiqiu.space/ietf125/)] [[Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=32RqJVymVk8&t=293s)]
Received the IRTF Diversity Travel Grant to attend IETF 125.
Started Ph.D. journey at Nankai University.
Completed Master's degree at IIE, CAS.
